description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Container that runs on push to the main branch, excluding changes to the web directory. Use an ubuntu-latest job to check out the repository, set up Docker Buildx, and login to the GitHub Container Registry if the repository is libgeos/geos. Then, build and push a Docker image using the Dockerfile in tools/ci/geosop, targeting the ghcr.io/libgeos/geosop:latest tag for linux/amd64 architecture.
